leganés, m last year of the academic formation as an erasmus student in germany, with focus in robotics, programming and artificial intelligence. bachelor's thesis about the use of machine learning and lidar for reactive obstacle avoidance in drones. junior engineer indra sistemas - aranjuez, madrid * electronic, electrical and software engineering support in projects. * management of the requirements and development of the new functionalities identified for their integration in the company's offer. * proposal of innovative ideas for the continuous improvement of the organization based on new technologies and trends. * drafting of technical documentation and technical presentations in a clear, concise and coherent manner. * collaboration with co-workers from different departments with different roles and responsibilities. * knowledge of the technical aspects, values and functionality of electronic and software products. * realization of material specifications, requests for offers and technical guides. * constant improvement and research about up-to date solutions available, both technical and in relation to its commercial proposal and its advantages and disadvantages. technician deltys s.l -
